options.command: set -a; [ ! -f .env ] || . ./.env; set +a; export DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-postgres://${POSTGRES_USER:-detailing}:${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-placeholder}@127.0.0.1:${POSTGRES_PORT:-5432}/${DEFAULT_DB:-detailing}}"; TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.json pnpm mikro-orm-esm migration:up --config apps/backend/api/src/config/mikro-orm-cli.config.ts
